The Master Plan

San Sebastian Site Plan

San Sebastian's carefully designed site plan delivers three residential phases and a prime commercial corridor along Highway 77. Each phase is thoughtfully laid out to maximize livability, green space, and connectivity throughout the community.

Phase 1 is currently underway — comprising 56 lots ready for commencement. Anticipated completion: April 2025.

Lots & Layouts

Select The Ideal Space
Tailored For Your Needs

San Sebastian provides an extensive range of lot sizes, catering to diverse preferences. From expansive 15,167 square foot lots to spacious 4,711 square foot options, buyers can select the ideal setting for their new residence. Each lot is meticulously designed to accommodate homes with a minimum footprint of 1,300 square feet. Buyers have the autonomy to choose from one- or two-story homes, with two-car garages.

📐
Lot Sizes
4,711 – 15,167 sq ft available
🏠
Minimum Home Size
1,300 sq ft minimum footprint
🏡
Home Stories
One or two-story options
🚗
Garages
Two-car garages included

Community Lifestyle

Amenities & Lifestyle — Designed For Active Living & Family Fun

Our community is designed for individuals who prioritize an active lifestyle and family engagement. Residents will have convenient access to picturesque hiking and biking trails, meticulously maintained parks, and designated dog parks.

⚽

Soccer and Basketball Areas

Enjoy basketball and football areas for friendly competition and community engagement right in your neighborhood.

🌳

Parks And Dog Parks

Join a neighborhood that prioritizes health and wellness lifestyles with beautifully maintained parks and dedicated dog-friendly zones.

🛝

Children Playground Areas

Safe outdoor play spaces specially designed for children's fun, adventure, and development — steps from your front door.

Commercial Opportunities

Commercial Lot Pads For Sale
Ready For Your Business

Eight premium commercial pad sites are now available for lease at San Sebastian. These strategically positioned sites are located along Highway 77, a high-traffic corridor with an average daily traffic volume ranging from 19,000 to 24,000 vehicles. This prime location offers an exceptional opportunity for businesses and franchisees seeking to establish a presence in a dynamic and high-visibility commercial environment.

High Visibility Location — Establish your business in one of San Benito, TX's most rapidly expanding areas, offering unparalleled access and visibility along Business 77 and Oscar Williams Road.

Ideal Business Types

Retail Shops Restaurants & Cafés Health & Wellness Centers Service-Based Businesses Fast Food Franchises Medical Offices

Vehicles/Day
Hwy 77
Development Progress

Project Timeline For
San Sebastian Development

Phase One · Active

Phase One — 56 Lots

Phase 1 of the construction project is currently underway and comprises a total of 56 lots that are ready for commencement. Anticipated completion: April 2025.

Phase Two · In Progress

Phase Two — 72 Lots

This phase encompasses an additional 72 lots, with the primary roadway extended to connect with North Oscar Williams Road. Construction commenced Q1 2025, projected completion Q4 2025.

Phase Three · Coming Soon

Phase Three — 51 Lots

The concluding phase encompasses 51 additional plots with an extension of the primary road providing additional access to West Business 77 Road.

Commercial · Available Now

Commercial Lots — 8 Pads

Position your business in one of the fastest-growing areas in San Benito, Texas, with exceptional access and visibility along Business 77 and Oscar Williams Road — over 24,000 vehicles per day.

Prime Location

A Great Location For
Residents & Businesses

San Sebastian is situated in the heart of San Benito, Texas, providing convenient access to Business 77 and Oscar Williams Road. Nestled within a thriving community, residents enjoy proximity to parks, educational institutions, and a diverse array of retail establishments.

🏥
Hospitals
Proximity to Valley Baptist Medical Center Harlingen and Brownsville, and other healthcare facilities.
🏫
School Districts
San Benito Consolidated Independent School District and others serving the community.
🛍️
Retail Options
Access to high-quality brands at nearby shopping centers and commercial corridors.
🦁
Gladys Porter Zoo
The only Zoo south of San Antonio is only 20 minutes away — perfect for family outings.
🎓
Higher Education
State university, technical and community colleges in proximity — UTB, TSC, and more.
🏖️
Beach Access
Visit South Padre Island and Boca Chica Beach in less than an hour from your front door.
🚀
SpaceX Starbase
SpaceX Starbase is less than an hour away — one of the most exciting destinations in America.
🛒
Groceries
H-E-B and Walmart are within a ten-minute drive — everyday convenience at your fingertips.
